title: SUMMERKIDS - 211info
text: CAMP FIRE CENTRAL OREGON SUMMERKIDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers summer enrichment programs which provide youth with opportunities to learn life skills through clubs, classes and camps focusing on STEM (science, technology, engineering and math), robotics, outdoor exploration, service and leadership. Eligibility: Ages 4-18 Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm Email (541) 382-4682 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 382-4682 Main phone Main phone (541) 382-4682 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: Sliding scale fee and scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Bend and Prineville Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - NO SCHOOL DAY CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
